text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: On one of my days off, I drop by the park, and...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Huh? My name? It's Haru Urara!

text_block_list.name: Lady A
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara? Oh my. Do you by chance study at
Tracen Academy?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, Haru Urara is having a picnic
with a random family.

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You're a Tracen Academy student?!
Incredible!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Oh, it's you, Trainer! Wanna have lunch with
us?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara sees that I'm here and invites me to
the picnic.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... That was so tasty! Thank you for the meal!

text_block_list.name: Lady A
text_block_list.text:
Please, don't mention it! It's my thanks for playing
with my son.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that reminds me! We've done seven rounds of
guessing which way the other is going to look, but
we haven't settled our score yet!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text:
You promised to do the last round after we ate!
But you better be ready for me to win!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah right! There's no way I'm gonna lose!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm the best at rock-paper-scissors AND at
turning my head really fast!

text_block_list.name: Lady A
text_block_list.text: Awww... They're just like brother and sister!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that her bright and bubbly personality
makes everyone want to be her friend.
